page.title: Water
page.description: Water is a precious resource. Our methodology helps accommodation facilities identify leaks and opportunities for greywater recycling.

validation.invalidOperatingDays: The year has a maximum of 365 days.
validation.missingFields: Please complete all fields in the tables: Operational Data and Water Sources.
validation.missingConsent: You must agree to data processing.

alerts.submitted: Data submitted. PDF generation will be added later.

consent.label: By submitting I agree to the processing of the entered data.

summary.title: What we measure?
summary.whyText: Reducing water consumption by 20% can save thousands of euros per year in water and sewage fees.
summary.quote: "Water is the driving force of all nature." — Leonardo da Vinci

groundwater.label: Groundwater (own borehole)
groundwater.tooltip: Self-supplied fresh water; include only permitted extraction.

rainwater.label: Rainwater harvesting
rainwater.tooltip: Collected rainwater used on site (typically non-potable).

greywater.label: Recycled / greywater use
greywater.tooltip: Water reused for toilets, irrigation, laundry, cooling, etc.

other.label: Other
other.tooltip: Tankers or other sources not listed above.
